I have been overseeing the holding for ten years.
We have closed three deals this year.
We have been streamlining operations since January.
Maria Claudia, welcome. We have built a strong partnership over the years. Shall we open the cycle with your mandate?
Thank you, David. My mandate is clear. I have been overseeing finance and sales for ten years, and I am accountable to the board for every result.
Excellent. And the results this year? The Houston stakeholders are eager to hear them.
We have closed three strategic deals, and we have consolidated two subsidiaries. We have been streamlining operations since January, and costs have fallen.
Impressive. The turnaround of the ceramics unit was a real milestone. What is your focus for this cycle?
I have been leveraging our scale to win better terms. My remit now is to align every stakeholder and deliver the next milestone with precision.
My mandate is to lead the finance and sales operations.
We have closed three deals and consolidated two subsidiaries.
I am accountable to the board for every result.

Maria Claudia, welcome to the new strategic cycle. I am David Chen, Operations Director at the Pittsburgh facility. For ten years you have overseen finance and sales for the holding, and you have built a remarkable track record. Our teams have been preparing for this cycle for months, and the results have been encouraging. We have consolidated two subsidiaries, and we have been streamlining the supply chain since January. The Houston stakeholders have reviewed your numbers, and they are impressed. Your mandate is clear: lead the financial and sales operations, and keep the partners aligned. You have closed three major deals this year alone, so you speak from strength. Tomorrow we open the kickoff call. Come ready to present your remit and your milestones. We have been waiting for this moment, and we are confident in your leadership.

As I open this new cycle, I want to be clear about my mandate and my remit. For ten years I have been overseeing finance and sales across the Curimbaba holding, and I have learned the business from the inside. My remit is broad: I am accountable to the board for results, and I lead operations across every subsidiary. The numbers speak for themselves. This year we have consolidated two subsidiaries, and we have closed three strategic deals. We have been streamlining our processes for months, and costs have fallen steadily. I have been building relationships with our Houston and Pittsburgh stakeholders, and the trust has grown. The turnaround of our ceramics unit was a real milestone. I have prepared carefully for this call, and I am ready to lead with authority and precision.

First, you state your mandate and remit, for example my mandate is to lead finance and sales across the holding. Then, you report your track record with the present perfect simple, such as we have closed three deals this year. After that, you describe your ongoing work with the present perfect continuous, for example we have been streamlining operations since January. Next, you highlight a milestone, such as the turnaround of the ceramics unit. Finally, you confirm that you are accountable to the board and ready to lead the new cycle with confidence.
We have closed three deals this year.
I have been overseeing the holding for ten years.
We have been streamlining operations since January.
My mandate is to lead finance and sales.
Finance and sales fall within my remit.
My mandate is to lead the finance and sales operations.
We have closed three deals and consolidated two subsidiaries.
I am accountable to the board for every result.
